name: Checklist — Manuscript Submission Readiness
input: Create a manuscript submission checklist. Done: Title page formatted, Abstract written, Methods section complete, Results with figures. Active: Discussion draft in review. Pending: Cover letter, Supplementary materials, Author contributions, Conflict of interest forms.
qualityCriteria: Items present (Title page, Abstract, Methods, Results, Discussion, Cover letter, Supplementary, Author, Conflict)
Status field is used on items
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
Checklist with status indicators for each item
napkinBenchmark: Vertical checklist with checkmarks (green) for done items, spinner/arrow for active, and empty circles for pending. Clear visual distinction between statuses.

items.label: Title page formatted
items.description: Title, authors, affiliations, corresponding author details

items.label: Abstract written
items.description: Structured abstract with background, methods, results, conclusion

items.label: Methods section complete
items.description: Study design, participants, procedures, statistical analysis

items.label: Results with figures
items.description: All tables, figures, and statistical results finalized

items.label: Discussion draft in review
items.description: Interpretation, limitations, future directions under revision

items.label: Cover letter
items.description: Addressed to editor, highlighting novelty and significance

items.label: Supplementary materials
items.description: Additional tables, raw data, extended methods

items.label: Author contributions
items.description: CRediT taxonomy roles for each co-author

items.label: Conflict of interest forms
items.description: ICMJE disclosure forms for all authors
